text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been training daily in preparation for the
Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: My time isn't improving!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Why? Why, why, why?! I'm trying so hard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her time isn't so bad as to raise real alarm bells,
but it's true that she's not making great progress.
choice_data_list: Maybe we should change your training plan.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh! In that case, I have an idea!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A type of training that really charges me up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Of all the things you could have called us here for...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You want to hold another scrimmage?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, lately my training hasn't been going
so great.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I figure if I can run with you guys again, it'll
feel like a real race and I'll do better!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's like when I was really struggling before. You
helped by running with me, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, around the time of the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We did a scrimmage, and it helped me beat
my own time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So I thought maybe that could work again.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That sounds logical. A scrimmage is good practice
for me as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: How about you, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If you're in, I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I don't know you've improved since
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh. In that case, I'll have to put even more effort
in.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All riiight! LET'S DO IT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the sound of the gates opening echoes under
the cloudy sky, the three runners dash off all at
once.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: GOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Young Student A
text_block_list.text: What's that, a scrimmage? Oh, it's Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Young Student B
text_block_list.text:
A BNW scrimmage! Those three are so cool
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the other students notice that BNW are racing,
a crowd begins to gather.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As expected, the race is a heated affair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Until...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(Huh? What's happening? They're pulling farther
ahead...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the final stretch, Winning Ticket is left behind
as the other two accelerate at amazing speeds.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Biwa Hayahide takes first place, with
Narita Taishin just behind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket ends up five to six lengths behind
them, and last to finish...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
They got away so fast! And my time wasn't any
better either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ticket droops her shoulders in defeat, when...

text_block_list.name: Young Student A
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo! That was so close! But it was still a good
race!

text_block_list.name: Young Student B
text_block_list.text: I was so happy to see a real race between BNW!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow! I didn't realize people were watching!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't even get close to winning, but
everyone's so happy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I guess that as long as I'm racing my rivals, it still
becomes an exciting race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Alrighty, I'll work harder, and next time I'll make
sure the race is even better to watch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hayahide, Taishin! Let's do another one!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin left already.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?! Why? What's the hurry?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She said she's going to do some runs on the ramp
track.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awww! I wanted to race together some more!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It seems like losing to me in that final struggle has
got her rather worked up.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Wouldn't scrimmages be more useful than
training on her own though?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, the one we had just now was really great!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? Was it?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. The last sprint between you and Taishin
was such a tough fight!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Everyone said it was a really intense race!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Did you think so too?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Even though you lost?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Yeah, I guess I didn't do very well, but you
know, I'll do better next time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll work harder and run an amazing race like at
the Derby. I'll show everyone!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: An amazing race... I see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Ticket. I should be going as well. See
you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: O-oh, okay—see you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hayahide too... What's up with them?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nghh! I couldn't even improve my time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if we did another one, I'd have shown
some progress...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! These kinda things happen!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But seriously, Hayahide and Taishin were so
awesome today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
They're the toughest rivals! Don't you think? It's
too bad I couldn't keep up.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still one of them. I'm gonna train hard so
we can have a really intense race, all together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket is as optimistic as ever, but I have the
feeling that something still isn't right.
